allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: target o_form_renderer for flex-direction column

From DevTools inspection: the actual flex container placing sheet_bg
and oe_chatter side-by-side is .o_form_renderer. Odoo Enterprise
overrides its flex-column to flex-row on wide screens. Now we force
flex-direction:column on .o_form_renderer when editor is present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
